authority.department: Labour Welfare Department, Government of Assam

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Assam.

rules.title: Review Assam Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Assam Shops and Establishments legislation is applicable.

citations.reference: Applicable Assam Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, records and notices prescribed under Assam labour laws.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display notices required under applicable Assam labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Weekly Offs and Leave
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Assam-specific provisions relating to working hours, weekly holidays and leave.

rules.title: Verify Professional Tax Applicability
rules.description: Review applicability of the Assam Profession, Trades, Callings and Employments Tax provisions, where applicable.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering registrations, registers, notices and statutory filings.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory renewals, inspections and labour compliance deadlines.
